response:
Brittany needs to calculate her total shampoo usage for a leap year which has 366 days, meaning she washes her hair 183 times since she does so every other day. With each wash requiring 1/4 ounce, the total amount needed is 45.75 ounces, and since she buys 14-ounce bottles, she will require [number] bottles to cover the entire year without running out before the end.

To ensure she has enough supply, she must purchase [quantity] bottles because buying only three would provide 42 ounces which is insufficient for the 45.75 ounces needed. This calculation shows that she must round up to the next whole bottle to guarantee she has shampoo for every scheduled wash throughout the leap year.
